description: This file defines styles for floating labels in form elements, including positioning, padding, transitions, and interactions with various input states.
external_files: variables or mixins files that define $form-floating-height, $form-floating-line-height, $form-floating-padding-y, $form-floating-padding-x, $form-floating-label-opacity, $input-border-width, $form-floating-label-transform, $form-floating-label-height, $input-bg, $input-border-radius, $input-disabled-bg, $form-floating-label-disabled-color, $input-border-width, $input-disabled-bg

methods.name: transition
methods.description: A mixin for applying CSS transitions, likely defined elsewhere in the SCSS project.

methods.name: border-radius
methods.description: A mixin for applying border-radius styles, likely defined elsewhere in the SCSS project.
